response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources you follow and the information you consume. Here are some tips: 1) Verify the credibility of the source by checking if they have a good reputation and if their information is fact-checked. 2) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of the information. 3) Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, and read beyond the headlines to get a more accurate picture. 4) Use social media platforms' built-in fact-checking features, such as the
